# AllEmber

> AllEmber (Ember Intelligence LLC, doing business as AllEmber Systems) is an AI implementation consultancy. We go into companies of any background — consulting, finance, research, marketing, small business — and build them a unified AI stack: automated workflows, retrieval over their own knowledge, secure MCP servers, and an engineer who keeps it all current. Tagline: "Don't let your AI stack fall behind."

## How we help

- **Initial Consult** (free): we scope what your company needs — workflows, tools, platforms — then implement.
- **FDE on Retainer**: a forward-deployed engineer stays on retainer and keeps your stack cutting edge, proactively.
- **Hearth Software Suite**: our own tools for tabular data (Hearth Tables), documents (Hearth Docs), automated workflows (Hearth Flows), knowledge retrieval (Hearth Recall), a shared agent memory layer (Hearth Hivemind / Hearth Brain), and monitoring (Hearth Watch).

## What we build

Internal RAG systems over company documents; workflow automations that draft standard documents, decks, and reports; custom APIs and secure, tenant-managed MCP servers (including private builds of tools like the Google Ads MCP); a shared "company brain" MCP layer so all of a client's agents can exchange context; web-capable agents running on managed cloud servers; monitoring that flags and cuts off anything broken or compromised. We deploy and configure tools clients already know: Claude, Claude Code, Microsoft 365 Copilot, Azure OpenAI, Qdrant. AllEmber is a Microsoft AI Cloud Partner.

## Selected work

- **Build Consulting**: end-to-end knowledge retrieval over firm documents, statements of work that draft themselves, a turbocharged Microsoft Copilot backed by Qdrant retrieval and open-web access, and agents connected over one shared MCP server.
- **Sapien Labs**: moving the entire organization onto Claude (from fragmented individual Claude/ChatGPT use), a shared agent memory layer, and connections to the third-party MCP servers their agents need.
- Additional design partners across university endowments, research labs, and consulting.
